Title: About ICICI Bank for interview | ICICI Bank Interview Questions and Answers | ICICI Careers

Description:
Welcome to our latest video on Growing Professional! Are you preparing for an interview with ICICI Bank and want to ace questions about the company? Look no further! In this video titled "About ICICI Bank for interview | ICICI Bank Interview Questions and Answers | ICICI Careers," we provide valuable insights into ICICI Bank's background, services, and career opportunities.

ICICI Bank, established in 1994, stands as India's largest private sector bank, offering a diverse range of financial services and products. With a robust international presence and leadership in digital banking, it caters to a broad clientele. Its specialized subsidiaries in asset management, insurance, venture capital, and investment banking further solidify its position in the financial sector. Boasting a vast network of branches and ATMs across India, ICICI Bank continues to innovate, as evidenced by its pioneering listing on the New York Stock Exchange in 1999.

Whether you're exploring ICICI careers or seeking insights into career opportunities in ICICI Bank Ltd, this video provides valuable information to help you prepare for your ICICI Bank interview. Stay tuned for expert tips and answers to common interview questions.

comments.text:
Dear ICICI Bank Team,@ Mona.shah@sandeep.bakshi

I am writing once again to express my deep disappointment with the way my complaint has been handled so far. I request you not to repeatedly advise me to approach the RBI, as I am already well aware of my rights and the RBI’s role.

Please confirm whether my savings account is opened and maintained with ICICI Bank or with the RBI, because if I have maintained a significant amount in my account, then the interest and benefits are earned by ICICI Bank, not RBI. Therefore, the responsibility for any fraud or negligence lies with ICICI Bank.

My account balance is not a matter of chance — it is earned through hard work and faith in your institution. I urge you to check your own internal systems (Perfios or other tools) and resolve my issue immediately. I demand that you release the withheld amount back into my account without further delay.

I also wish to state that I will be raising awareness on social media platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube to warn others not to trust ICICI Bank for any type of financial service — be it personal loans, home loans, car loans, business loans, or even basic transactions.

In my opinion, ICICI Bank is one of the few banks openly compromising customer trust by allowing their data to be misused or leaked, which directly fuels cybercrime. This is evident in the fraudulent activity that has occurred in my account.

I expect a prompt and fair resolution from your side. Please consider this a final reminder before I escalate this matter further.

Regards

Sandeep Bhalla
